mapper.select: SELECT season_id FROM season WHERE active_yn=true ORDER BY season_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT im.match_id "matchId",im.season_id "seasonId",s.season_name "seasonName",im.played_at "playedAt",im.winner_team "winnerTeam",im.memo,im.blue_cost "blueCost",im.red_cost "redCost",im.created_at "createdAt",im.updated_at "updatedAt",im.updated_by "updatedBy",im.update_reason "updateReason",im.force_yn "forceYn" FROM inhouse_match im LEFT JOIN season s ON s.season_id=im.season_id WHERE im.season_id=#{seasonId} ORDER BY GREATEST(im.played_at,im.updated_at) DESC,im.match_id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT im.match_id "matchId",im.season_id "seasonId",s.season_name "seasonName",im.played_at "playedAt",im.winner_team "winnerTeam",im.memo,im.blue_cost "blueCost",im.red_cost "redCost",im.created_at "createdAt",im.updated_at "updatedAt",im.updated_by "updatedBy",im.update_reason "updateReason",im.force_yn "forceYn" FROM inhouse_match im LEFT JOIN season s ON s.season_id=im.season_id WHERE im.match_id=#{id}

SELECT mp.*,m.real_name "realName",m.game_name "gameName",m.tag_line "tagLine" FROM inhouse_match_player mp JOIN member m ON m.member_id=mp.member_id WHERE match_id=#{id} ORDER BY CASE team_code WHEN 'BLUE' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,CASE position_code WHEN 'TOP' THEN 1 WHEN 'JUNGLE' THEN 2 WHEN 'MID' THEN 3 WHEN 'ADC' THEN 4 WHEN 'SUPPORT' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END

SELECT 'memberCount' metric,COUNT(*) value FROM member WHERE active_yn=true UNION ALL SELECT 'matchCount',COUNT(*) FROM inhouse_match WHERE season_id=#{seasonId} UNION ALL SELECT 'blueWins',COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE winner_team='BLUE') FROM inhouse_match WHERE season_id=#{seasonId} UNION ALL SELECT 'redWins',COUNT(*) FILTER(WHERE winner_team='RED') FROM inhouse_match WHERE season_id=#{seasonId}

SELECT m.member_id,m.real_name,m.game_name,m.tag_line,m.solo_tier,m.solo_rank,m.balance_score,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) match_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn) win_count,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE NOT mp.win_yn) loss_count,COALESCE(ROUND(COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.win_yn)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(mp.match_player_id),0),1),0) win_rate,COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER(WHERE mp.mvp_yn) mvp_count,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mp.kills),1),0) avg_kills,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mp.deaths),1),0) avg_deaths,COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mp.assists),1),0) avg_assists FROM member m LEFT JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id LEFT JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=mp.match_id AND im.season_id=#{seasonId} WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id ORDER BY win_rate DESC,match_count DESC,m.real_name

WITH stat AS ( SELECT m.member_id, m.real_name, COUNT(mp.match_player_id) AS games, COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER (WHERE mp.win_yn) AS wins, COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER (WHERE mp.mvp_yn) AS mvps, COALESCE(SUM(mp.kills),0) AS kills, COALESCE(SUM(mp.assists),0) AS assists, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(mp.deaths),2),0) AS avg_deaths, COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(mp.match_player_id) FILTER (WHERE mp.win_yn) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(mp.match_player_id),0), 1 ), 0 ) AS win_rate FROM member m LEFT JOIN inhouse_match_player mp ON mp.member_id=m.member_id LEFT JOIN inhouse_match im ON im.match_id=mp.match_id AND im.season_id=#{seasonId} WHERE m.active_yn=true GROUP BY m.member_id ), win_rate_award AS ( SELECT 'WIN_RATE' AS award_code, '승률왕' AS award_name, s.real_name, s.win_rate::numeric AS value, s.games FROM stat s WHERE s.games >= 3 ORDER BY s.win_rate DESC, s.games DESC, s.real_name LIMIT 1 ), most_games_award AS ( SELECT 'MOST_GAMES' AS award_code, '최다 출전' AS award_name, s.real_name, s.games::numeric AS value, s.games FROM stat s ORDER BY s.games DESC, s.real_name LIMIT 1 ), mvp_award AS ( SELECT 'MVP' AS award_code, 'MVP 왕' AS award_name, s.real_name, s.mvps::numeric AS value, s.games FROM stat s ORDER BY s.mvps DESC, s.games DESC, s.real_name LIMIT 1 ), kills_award AS ( SELECT 'KILLS' AS award_code, '킬 머신' AS award_name, s.real_name, s.kills::numeric AS value, s.games FROM stat s ORDER BY s.kills DESC, s.games DESC, s.real_name LIMIT 1 ), assists_award AS ( SELECT 'ASSISTS' AS award_code, '어시스트 왕' AS award_name, s.real_name, s.assists::numeric AS value, s.games FROM stat s ORDER BY s.assists DESC, s.games DESC, s.real_name LIMIT 1 ), survivor_award AS ( SELECT 'SURVIVOR' AS award_code, '생존왕' AS award_name, s.real_name, s.avg_deaths::numeric AS value, s.games FROM stat s WHERE s.games >= 3 ORDER BY s.avg_deaths ASC, s.games DESC, s.real_name LIMIT 1 ) SELECT * FROM win_rate_award UNION ALL SELECT * FROM most_games_award UNION ALL SELECT * FROM mvp_award UNION ALL SELECT * FROM kills_award UNION ALL SELECT * FROM assists_award UNION ALL SELECT * FROM survivor_award

SELECT match_id "matchId",played_at "playedAt",updated_at "updatedAt",updated_by "updatedBy",update_reason "updateReason",winner_team "winnerTeam",memo FROM inhouse_match WHERE updated_at > created_at + INTERVAL '1 second' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5
